title: draft_meeting_note
description: Slice 15 structured output for the draft_meeting_note task_type. The meeting-note template embeds these fields into a scaffold note; the note is a nudge, not a transcript.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence scaffold summary. Prompt the user, do not invent content.

action_item_candidates.description: Candidate follow-ups inferred from the event description and memory context. May be empty.

open_questions.description: Questions the user should resolve before closing the loop. May be empty.

links_suggested.description: Suggested wikilinks (e.g. '[[Projects/Onboarding]]') derived from memory hits. May be empty.
